summary: Iteration 32: Multi-Division Catalog Expansion fully verified. All 22 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests confirmed all 4 divisions (Trauma, Cardiovascular, Diagnostics, Joint Replacement) working correctly with proper icons, colors, product counts, breadcrumbs, and back links.
test_credentials: No credentials needed - catalog endpoints are public
seed_data_creation: None - using existing catalog_products and catalog_skus collections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-division expansion complete. All 4 divisions verified: Trauma (44 products, bone icon, amber), Cardiovascular (8 products, heart-pulse icon, rose), Diagnostics (63 products, microscope icon, violet), Joint Replacement (7 products, activity icon, teal). Product detail pages show correct division breadcrumbs and back links. P0/P1 features (image_type, parent_brand, title-cased specs) working across all divisions.

divisions_endpoint.GET /api/catalog/divisions: PASS - Returns all 4 divisions with correct metadata

p0_p1_fields.image_type: PASS - All products have image_type field
p0_p1_fields.parent_brand: PASS - All products have parent_brand field
p0_p1_fields.division_slug: PASS - All products have correct division_slug

frontend_catalog_index.all_4_division_cards: PASS - Trauma, Cardiovascular, Diagnostics, Joint Replacement cards displayed
frontend_catalog_index.icons: PASS - Bone, HeartPulse, Microscope, Activity icons displayed
frontend_catalog_index.colors: PASS - Amber, Rose, Violet, Teal color themes applied

frontend_division_pages.cardiovascular_page: PASS - HeartPulse icon, rose theme, 8 products, sidebar filters
frontend_division_pages.diagnostics_page: PASS - Microscope icon, violet theme, 63 products, pagination
frontend_division_pages.joint_replacement_page: PASS - Activity icon, teal theme, 7 products
frontend_division_pages.trauma_page: PASS - Bone icon, amber theme, 44 products (backward compatible)

frontend_product_detail.cardiovascular_breadcrumb: PASS - Home > Portfolio > Cardiovascular > Category > Product
frontend_product_detail.cardiovascular_back_link: PASS - 'Back to Cardiovascular Catalog' (not hardcoded to Trauma)
frontend_product_detail.joint_replacement_breadcrumb: PASS - Home > Portfolio > Joint Replacement > Category > Product
frontend_product_detail.back_link_navigation: PASS - Clicking back link navigates to correct division
